title: A2A Verification Result
description: Cross-language schema for A2A artifact verification results. Defines the normalized contract per TR-3 of the ATTESTATION_A2A_RESOLUTION PRD. All field names use camelCase.

status.description: Detailed verification status indicating whether and how the signature was verified.

valid.description: Whether the signature was cryptographically verified. False for both Invalid and Unverified statuses.

timestamp.description: Timestamp when the artifact was signed (RFC 3339).

parentSignaturesValid.description: Whether all parent signatures in the chain are valid.

parentVerificationResults.description: Individual verification results for each parent signature.

originalArtifact.description: The original A2A artifact that was wrapped.

trustLevel.description: Trust level of the signing agent (present when policy-based verification is used).

trustAssessment.description: Trust policy assessment details (present when policy-based verification is used).

VerificationStatus.description: Verification status enum. Simple variants serialize as strings; Unverified and Invalid serialize as objects with a reason field.

oneOf.description: Signature is from the current agent (self-signed) and was verified.
Signature could not be verified because the public key is not available.

reason.description: Explanation of why verification was not possible.

oneOf.description: Signature verification failed - the signature is invalid.

reason.description: Explanation of why the signature is invalid.

TrustLevel.description: Assessed trust level of the signing agent.

TrustAssessment.description: Result of assessing a remote agent's trustworthiness.

allowed.description: Whether the agent is allowed to interact under the applied policy.

jacsRegistered.description: Whether the remote agent declares the JACS provenance extension.

agentId.description: The agent ID from the remote card's metadata (null if unavailable).

policy.description: The trust policy that was applied.

A2ATrustPolicy.description: Trust policy controlling which remote agents are allowed to interact.

ParentVerificationResult.description: Result of verifying a parent signature in a chain of custody.

index.description: Index in the parent signatures array.

signerId.description: ID of the agent that signed the parent.

status.description: Verification status of this parent signature.

verified.description: Whether the parent signature was verified (convenience field).
